arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United honeymoon period backed to come to an abrupt end at Arsenal
arts.sum: Amorim is unbeaten in his first three games as United manager and now travels to North London to take on Arsenal

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains how Bukayo Saka is seeking to emulate his childhood hero Cristiano Ronaldo amid the Gunners star's red-hot start to the campaign
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has explained how Bukayo Saka is seeking to emulate his childhood hero Cristiano Ronaldo amid the Arsenal star's incredible start to the campaign.

arts.ttl: What Jerry Jones has previously said about Arsenal owner Stan Kroenke amid Spurs takeover talks
arts.sum: There may be about to be a huge ownership shake-up at Tottenham Hotspur. Indeed, Amanda Staveley has been linked with Spurs for a little while...

arts.ttl: What Marcus Rashford must do to win back trust of Manchester United fans
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has scored three times in two Premier League games under Ruben Amorim having been handed a new role by the new Manchester United boss

arts.ttl: Manchester United show interest in RB Leipzig’s David Raum
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in RB Leipzig and Germany international David Raum, according to Florian Plettenburg. Under new head coach Ruben Amorim, Manchester United will be taking a close look…

arts.ttl: Manchester United dealt Viktor Gyokeres transfer blow as Premier League rivals 'in pole position'
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres reuniting with Ruben Amorim at Manchester United is only one of several potential options for the Sporting striker ahead of the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester United score predicted with huge Premier League drama
arts.sum: Manchester United face Arsenal in the Premier League later today, so we simulated the clash to predict what could happen.

arts.ttl: 10 players could miss Arsenal vs Man Utd as new injury revealed in emotional statement
arts.sum: Another problem then came to light for Arsenal with Gabriel Magalhaes, after scoring and winning a penalty, going off at half time with Arteta revealing it was related to the issue he felt against Sporting CP earlier that week. The Gunners have been plagued by injuries this season and though Mikel Arteta's side finally looked to be over that crisis, three fresh issues have since emerged.

arts.ttl: We simulated Arsenal vs Man United to predict huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: A thrilling first half saw Arsenal score five goals in a 5-2 win over West Ham United, with the Gunners ending the week second in the Premier League table, joint on points with third-placed Chelsea. Arsenal have the chance to make it three Premier League wins in a row later today when they take on rivals Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal & Liverpool monitoring Brazilian winger ahead of potential transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are both understood to be monitoring LA Galaxy’s highly-rated Brazilian winger Gabriel Pec, sources have told CaughtOffside. The Gunners and the Reds are among a number of Premier League clubs who’ve had scouts keeping an eye on Pec, who is showing himself to be an exciting young talent.
